this_class    Producer
super_class   java/lang/Object
access_flags  0x0031
field         value : Ljava/lang/Object; 0x0012
method        <init> (Ljava/lang/Object;)V 0x0001

    0000 op_0x2A
    0001 invokespecial Method(java/lang/Object.<init>:()V)
    0004 op_0x2A
    0005 op_0x2B
    0006 op_0xB5
    0007 nop
    0008 op_0x0F

  attr        Signature (2 bytes)
method        getValue ()Ljava/lang/Object; 0x0011
  code        max_stack=1 max_locals=1
    0000 op_0x2A
    0001 op_0xB4
    0002 nop
